faculty: Informatics, Design, Media and Town & Regional Planning

qualifications.name: Diploma in Architectural Technology
notes: Department: Architectural Technology and Interior Design.
APS score: 30 with Mathematics OR 32 with Mathematical Literacy.

Faculty notes: Technical Mathematics is not compulsory; it caters for TVET students; Technical Mathematics applies to all courses listed on this page; Meeting minimum requirements does not automatically mean applicants will be accepted; First option for admission, selection and placement will be given; Pre-2008 matriculants must contact the faculty office for information.

Closing date note: closing_date: 30 September; programmes: ['Architectural Technology', 'Fashion', 'Visual Communication Design', 'Interior Design', 'Jewellery Design and Manufacture', 'Product Design'].

ECP consideration notes: Subject to space availability, consideration may be given for admission to Design ECP programmes with English level 4; For the Design ECP programmes, Mathematics level 2 OR Mathematical Literacy level 4 OR Technical Mathematics level 3 may be considered; This applies to Fashion Design ECP, Visual Communication Design ECP, Jewellery Design and Manufacture ECP, and Product Design ECP.
